summary: John Sterling, the radio voice of the New York Yankees over 36 seasons, died today, May 4, at his home in Edgewater, New Jersey, of complications following a heart attack. He was 87. His death was announced by the New York Yankees. “The Yankees mourn the loss of legendary broadcaster John Sterling,” the organization said […]
headline: John Sterling Dies: Longtime Radio Voice Of New York Yankees Was 87
